query: /infrastructure-coder kubernetes Generate Kubernetes manifests for a Node.js API with 3 replicas, resource limits, health checks, and a HorizontalPodAutoscaler
expected_behavior: Agent generates Deployment manifest with 3 replicas
Agent generates Service manifest (ClusterIP or LoadBalancer) for the API
Agent generates HorizontalPodAutoscaler manifest with CPU/memory scaling targets
Agent includes resource requests and limits on all containers
Agent includes liveness and readiness probes (HTTP health check endpoints)
Agent applies security context (non-root, read-only root filesystem, drop capabilities)
Agent runs k8s-manifest-validator.py on generated manifests
Agent uses specific base image tags (not latest)
